seoTitle: Windang vs Windellama — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Windang and Windellama. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Windang and Windellama.
heading: Windang vs Windellama — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Windang, New South Wales and Windellama, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Windellama has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Windang (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Windang or Windellama safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Windang has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Windellama scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Windang scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Windellama scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Windang or Windellama?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Windellama has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
